title_en: Constitution of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国宪法
citation: Constitution of the People's Republic of China (adopted 4 December 1982, as amended).
summary: The constitutional baseline for PRC state institutions, sovereignty, and foreign relations authority.
significance_note: Useful for connecting China's external legal positions to domestic constitutional structure.

title_en: Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
title_zh: 中华人民共和国香港特别行政区基本法
citation: Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (adopted 4 April 1990).
summary: Constitutional instrument for Hong Kong's post-1997 legal order under Chinese sovereignty.
significance_note: Central for debates over sovereignty, autonomy, treaty continuity, and judicial authority.

title_en: The Taiwan Question and Reunification of China
title_zh: 台湾问题与中国的统一
citation: State Council Information Office, 'The Taiwan Question and Reunification of China' (31 August 1993).
summary: Early PRC white paper setting out the official position on Taiwan and sovereignty.
significance_note: A baseline text for tracking continuity and change in PRC sovereignty doctrine.

title_en: Protocol on the Accession of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国加入世界贸易组织议定书
citation: WTO, 'Protocol on the Accession of the People's Republic of China' WT/L/432 (10 November 2001).
summary: The legal instrument by which China acceded to the WTO.
significance_note: Foundational for studying China's integration into the trade law system and subsequent disputes.

title_en: Anti-Secession Law
title_zh: 反分裂国家法
citation: Anti-Secession Law of the People's Republic of China (adopted 14 March 2005).
summary: PRC legislation concerning Taiwan, peaceful reunification, and conditions for non-peaceful means.
significance_note: Key text for linking sovereignty claims with PRC positions on force and domestic legal authorization.

title_en: China's Peaceful Development
title_zh: 中国的和平发展
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China's Peaceful Development' (6 September 2011).
summary: White paper presenting peaceful development as a guiding framework for China's rise.
significance_note: Important for assessing how official discourse links development, security, and international order.

title_en: China's Foreign Aid
title_zh: 中国的对外援助
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China's Foreign Aid' (21 April 2011).
summary: White paper describing principles and modes of Chinese foreign aid.
significance_note: A pre-BRI reference point for Chinese development cooperation norms.

title_en: Diaoyu Dao, an Inherent Territory of China
title_zh: 钓鱼岛是中国的固有领土
citation: State Council Information Office, 'Diaoyu Dao, an Inherent Territory of China' (25 September 2012).
summary: Official white paper setting out China's claim to Diaoyu Dao/Senkaku Islands.
significance_note: Useful for comparison with maritime and territorial sovereignty arguments elsewhere.

title_en: China's Foreign Aid (2014)
title_zh: 中国的对外援助（2014）
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China's Foreign Aid (2014)' (10 July 2014).
summary: Follow-up white paper on China's foreign aid policies and practices.
significance_note: Helps track development-cooperation language before the BRI white papers.

title_en: Vision and Actions on Jointly Building Silk Road Economic Belt and 21st-Century Maritime Silk Road
title_zh: 推动共建丝绸之路经济带和21世纪海上丝绸之路的愿景与行动
citation: NDRC, MFA and MOFCOM, 'Vision and Actions on Jointly Building Silk Road Economic Belt and 21st-Century Maritime Silk Road' (28 March 2015).
summary: Foundational policy document for the Belt and Road Initiative.
significance_note: Frames BRI as connectivity, cooperation, and development rather than treaty-based institutional integration.

title_en: Position Paper on the Matter of Jurisdiction in the South China Sea Arbitration
title_zh: 关于菲律宾所提南海仲裁案管辖权问题的立场文件
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'Position Paper on the Matter of Jurisdiction in the South China Sea Arbitration' (7 December 2014).
summary: PRC position rejecting jurisdiction in the arbitration initiated by the Philippines.
significance_note: Central text for China's consent-based approach to international adjudication in maritime disputes.

title_en: China Adheres to the Position of Settling Through Negotiation the Relevant Disputes Between China and the Philippines in the South China Sea
title_zh: 中国坚持通过谈判解决中国与菲律宾在南海的有关争议
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China Adheres to the Position of Settling Through Negotiation...' (13 July 2016).
summary: Official white paper after the South China Sea arbitral award.
significance_note: Shows China's preference for negotiation and objections to compulsory arbitration in the dispute.

title_en: Jointly Shoulder Responsibility of Our Times, Promote Global Growth
title_zh: 共担时代责任 共促全球发展
citation: Xi Jinping, 'Jointly Shoulder Responsibility of Our Times, Promote Global Growth' (Davos, 17 January 2017).
summary: Speech defending economic globalization and multilateral cooperation.
significance_note: Important for the official narrative of China as a supporter of globalization.

title_en: International Strategy of Cooperation on Cyberspace
title_zh: 网络空间国际合作战略
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'International Strategy of Cooperation on Cyberspace' (1 March 2017).
summary: Policy document advancing cyber sovereignty and international cooperation.
significance_note: Useful for studying the extension of sovereignty discourse into digital governance.

title_en: China and the World Trade Organization
title_zh: 中国与世界贸易组织
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China and the World Trade Organization' (28 June 2018).
summary: White paper defending China's record in WTO accession and implementation.
significance_note: Key source for China's self-presentation as a WTO participant and reform stakeholder.

title_en: China's Position on the China-US Economic and Trade Consultations
title_zh: 关于中美经贸磋商的中方立场
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China's Position on the China-US Economic and Trade Consultations' (2 June 2019).
summary: White paper on the US-China trade conflict and negotiations.
significance_note: Connects trade law, unilateral measures, and China's rhetoric of mutual respect.

title_en: Export Control Law of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国出口管制法
citation: Export Control Law of the People's Republic of China (adopted 17 October 2020).
summary: Framework law for export controls and related national security measures.
significance_note: Part of the legal architecture for economic security and countermeasure capacity.

title_en: Rules on Counteracting Unjustified Extra-territorial Application of Foreign Legislation and Other Measures
title_zh: 阻断外国法律与措施不当域外适用办法
citation: MOFCOM, 'Rules on Counteracting Unjustified Extra-territorial Application of Foreign Legislation and Other Measures' (9 January 2021).
summary: Chinese blocking rules responding to foreign extraterritorial measures.
significance_note: Core source for China's legal response to sanctions and extraterritorial jurisdiction.

title_en: Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law of the People's Republic of China
title_zh: 中华人民共和国反外国制裁法
citation: Anti-Foreign Sanctions Law of the People's Republic of China (adopted 10 June 2021).
summary: National law authorizing countermeasures against foreign sanctions.
significance_note: Essential for studying how China domesticates responses to unilateral sanctions.

title_en: China's International Development Cooperation in the New Era
title_zh: 新时代的中国国际发展合作
citation: State Council Information Office, 'China's International Development Cooperation in the New Era' (10 January 2021).
summary: White paper on China's development cooperation principles and practices.
significance_note: Links BRI, South-South cooperation, and development governance.

title_en: The Taiwan Question and China's Reunification in the New Era
title_zh: 台湾问题与新时代中国统一事业
citation: State Council Information Office, 'The Taiwan Question and China's Reunification in the New Era' (10 August 2022).
summary: Recent PRC white paper on Taiwan policy and reunification.
significance_note: Shows updated official framing of sovereignty, national rejuvenation, and peaceful reunification.

title_en: The Global Security Initiative Concept Paper
title_zh: 全球安全倡议概念文件
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'The Global Security Initiative Concept Paper' (21 February 2023).
summary: Concept paper elaborating China's Global Security Initiative.
significance_note: Frames security governance through indivisible security, sovereignty, and opposition to bloc confrontation.

title_en: A Global Community of Shared Future: China's Proposals and Actions
title_zh: 携手构建人类命运共同体：中国的倡议与行动
citation: State Council Information Office, 'A Global Community of Shared Future: China's Proposals and Actions' (26 September 2023).
summary: White paper presenting the community of shared future as a broad international-order concept.
significance_note: A key official statement of China's normative vocabulary for global governance.

title_en: The Belt and Road Initiative: A Key Pillar of the Global Community of Shared Future
title_zh: 共建“一带一路”：构建人类命运共同体的重大实践
citation: State Council Information Office, 'The Belt and Road Initiative: A Key Pillar of the Global Community of Shared Future' (10 October 2023).
summary: White paper on BRI principles, achievements, and global-order significance.
significance_note: Central source for evaluating whether BRI is presented as a parallel or complementary order.

title_en: Proposal of the People's Republic of China on the Reform and Development of Global Governance
title_zh: 关于全球治理改革和建设的中国方案
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'Proposal of the People's Republic of China on the Reform and Development of Global Governance' (13 September 2023).
summary: MFA proposal on global governance reform across security, development, human rights, and institutions.
significance_note: Useful as a compact statement of China's reformist rather than withdrawalist posture.

title_en: Global Development Initiative Progress Report
institution: Center for International Knowledge on Development
citation: Center for International Knowledge on Development, 'Global Development Initiative Progress Report' (2023).
summary: Report on implementation of the Global Development Initiative.
significance_note: Connects Chinese development discourse with institutional and project-based cooperation.

title_en: Guidelines on Punishing Taiwan Independence Diehards for Splitting the Country and Inciting Secession
title_zh: 关于依法惩治“台独”顽固分子分裂国家、煽动分裂国家犯罪的意见
institution: Supreme People's Court and related authorities
citation: SPC, SPP, Ministry of Public Security, Ministry of State Security and Ministry of Justice, 'Guidelines on Punishing Taiwan Independence Diehards...' (21 June 2024).
summary: Guidelines on criminal liability relating to Taiwan independence activities.
significance_note: Illustrates the domestic legal extension of sovereignty claims.

title_en: Charter of the United Nations
citation: UN Charter (signed 26 June 1945, entered into force 24 October 1945).
summary: Foundational treaty for sovereignty, non-use of force, and collective security.
significance_note: Baseline text for comparing China's doctrine with the post-1945 legal order.

title_en: Declaration on Principles of International Law concerning Friendly Relations and Co-operation among States
citation: UNGA Res 2625 (XXV) (24 October 1970).
summary: Canonical General Assembly declaration on sovereign equality, non-intervention, and force.
significance_note: Frequently invoked in debates over China's doctrinal commitments.

title_en: Restoration of the lawful rights of the People's Republic of China in the United Nations
citation: UNGA Res 2758 (XXVI) (25 October 1971).
summary: Resolution seating the PRC at the United Nations.
significance_note: Key legal-political reference in PRC arguments about representation and Taiwan.

title_en: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea
citation: United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (opened for signature 10 December 1982).
summary: Comprehensive treaty governing maritime zones and dispute settlement.
significance_note: Necessary context for the South China Sea arbitration and maritime sovereignty disputes.

title_en: Marrakesh Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization
citation: Marrakesh Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization (15 April 1994).
summary: Treaty establishing the WTO and its dispute settlement system.
significance_note: Core institutional frame for China's trade-law practice after accession.

title_en: Legality of the Threat or Use of Nuclear Weapons Advisory Opinion
citation: Legality of the Threat or Use of Nuclear Weapons, Advisory Opinion, ICJ Reports 1996.
summary: ICJ advisory opinion on nuclear weapons and the law of force.
significance_note: Useful for comparing Chinese positions on strategic stability and Charter restraints.

title_en: Legal Consequences of the Construction of a Wall in the Occupied Palestinian Territory
citation: Legal Consequences of the Construction of a Wall, Advisory Opinion, ICJ Reports 2004.
summary: ICJ advisory opinion addressing occupation, self-determination, and use of force.
significance_note: Relevant to China's voting and rhetorical practice on occupied territories.

title_en: Accordance with International Law of the Unilateral Declaration of Independence in Respect of Kosovo
citation: Accordance with International Law of the Unilateral Declaration of Independence in Respect of Kosovo, Advisory Opinion, ICJ Reports 2010.
summary: ICJ advisory opinion on unilateral declarations of independence.
significance_note: Useful comparison point for PRC positions on territorial integrity and secession.

title_en: Paris Agreement
institution: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change
citation: Paris Agreement (adopted 12 December 2015, entered into force 4 November 2016).
summary: Climate treaty reflecting nationally determined contributions and differentiated responsibilities.
significance_note: Shows a governance model where China emphasizes equity, development, and multilateralism.

title_en: South China Sea Arbitration Award
citation: South China Sea Arbitration (Philippines v China), Award (12 July 2016).
summary: UNCLOS Annex VII award in the Philippines-China arbitration.
significance_note: A central reference for China's rejection of compulsory adjudication in a major maritime dispute.

title_en: Legal Consequences of the Separation of the Chagos Archipelago from Mauritius in 1965
citation: Legal Consequences of the Separation of the Chagos Archipelago, Advisory Opinion, ICJ Reports 2019.
summary: ICJ advisory opinion on decolonization and territorial integrity.
significance_note: Useful for tracking China's positions on colonial history and self-determination.

title_en: Obligations of States in Respect of Climate Change
citation: Obligations of States in Respect of Climate Change, ICJ advisory proceedings.
summary: Advisory proceedings on climate obligations under international law.
significance_note: A live site for China's legal arguments about development, responsibility, and multilateral treaty regimes.

title_en: PRC assumes China's seat at the United Nations
citation: United Nations, 'PRC assumes China's seat at the United Nations' (1971-11-15).
summary: State practice marker on representation and participation in universal institutions.
significance_note: State practice marker on representation and participation in universal institutions.

title_en: China joins UN peacekeeping operations
citation: United Nations Peacekeeping, 'China joins UN peacekeeping operations' (1988-09-01).
summary: Important practice showing evolution from suspicion of intervention to active peacekeeping participation.
significance_note: Important practice showing evolution from suspicion of intervention to active peacekeeping participation.

title_en: Resumption of exercise of sovereignty over Hong Kong
institution: Government of the Hong Kong SAR
citation: Government of the Hong Kong SAR, 'Resumption of exercise of sovereignty over Hong Kong' (1997-07-01).
summary: Practice point for sovereignty, treaty continuity, and one country, two systems.
significance_note: Practice point for sovereignty, treaty continuity, and one country, two systems.

title_en: China becomes a WTO member
citation: World Trade Organization, 'China becomes a WTO member' (2001-12-11).
summary: Marks China's formal integration into the WTO legal order.
significance_note: Marks China's formal integration into the WTO legal order.

title_en: China deploys naval escort task force to the Gulf of Aden
citation: Ministry of National Defense, 'China deploys naval escort task force to the Gulf of Aden' (2008-12-26).
summary: Shows overseas security practice framed around UN-authorized anti-piracy cooperation.
significance_note: Shows overseas security practice framed around UN-authorized anti-piracy cooperation.

title_en: Belt and Road Initiative announced
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'Belt and Road Initiative announced' (2013-09-07).
summary: Starting point for BRI as a major foreign economic and legal ordering project.
significance_note: Starting point for BRI as a major foreign economic and legal ordering project.

title_en: Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank Articles of Agreement signed
citation: Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank, 'Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank Articles of Agreement signed' (2015-06-29).
summary: Institution-building practice around development finance and infrastructure.
significance_note: Institution-building practice around development finance and infrastructure.

title_en: China declines to participate in South China Sea arbitration
citation: Permanent Court of Arbitration, 'China declines to participate in South China Sea arbitration' (2016-07-12).
summary: Important example of non-appearance and jurisdictional objection strategy.
significance_note: Important example of non-appearance and jurisdictional objection strategy.

title_en: First Belt and Road Forum for International Cooperation
citation: Belt and Road Portal, 'First Belt and Road Forum for International Cooperation' (2017-05-14).
summary: Signals BRI's transformation into a standing diplomatic and institutional platform.
significance_note: Signals BRI's transformation into a standing diplomatic and institutional platform.

title_en: Law on Safeguarding National Security in the Hong Kong SAR
citation: National People's Congress, 'Law on Safeguarding National Security in the Hong Kong SAR' (2020-06-30).
summary: Legal practice central to sovereignty, autonomy, sanctions, and non-interference debates.
significance_note: Legal practice central to sovereignty, autonomy, sanctions, and non-interference debates.

title_en: China announces countermeasures against foreign sanctions
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'China announces countermeasures against foreign sanctions' (2021-03-22).
summary: Shows operational use of sanctions countermeasures alongside new domestic legislation.
significance_note: Shows operational use of sanctions countermeasures alongside new domestic legislation.

title_en: China's votes and explanations on Ukraine-related UN resolutions
citation: United Nations Digital Library, 'China's votes and explanations on Ukraine-related UN resolutions' (2022-03-02).
summary: Important practice for assessing sovereignty language, use of force, and non-alignment.
significance_note: Important practice for assessing sovereignty language, use of force, and non-alignment.

title_en: China facilitates Saudi-Iran rapprochement
citation: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 'China facilitates Saudi-Iran rapprochement' (2023-03-10).
summary: Example of China presenting itself as a mediator in regional dispute settlement.
significance_note: Example of China presenting itself as a mediator in regional dispute settlement.

title_en: Third Belt and Road Forum for International Cooperation
citation: Belt and Road Portal, 'Third Belt and Road Forum for International Cooperation' (2023-10-18).
summary: Shows BRI's continued diplomatic institutionalization after ten years.
significance_note: Shows BRI's continued diplomatic institutionalization after ten years.

title_en: China participates in ICJ climate advisory proceedings
citation: International Court of Justice, 'China participates in ICJ climate advisory proceedings' (2024-03-22).
summary: Contemporary legal practice on climate obligations and development equity.
significance_note: Contemporary legal practice on climate obligations and development equity.

citation: WTO, 'DS252: dispute settlement case page'.
summary: WTO dispute settlement page for a China-related trade dispute or comparator dispute in China's trade-law practice.
significance_note: Useful for mapping China's use of rules-based economic dispute settlement over time.
